# PHIL.081 ? Personalism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** personalism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Irreducible value of persons; dignity; relation and community; against depersonalization; person as fundamental category

## Application
Recognize inherent personal dignity; relational ontology; resist reduction of persons; community and relation; personal freedom

## Key Values
- Personal dignity
- Relationality
- Irreducibility
- Community

## Tags
philosophy, contemporary, personalism
